flags_raised: CRITICAL: $6,542.19 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 38.4% aligned with expected compliance behavior

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed due to its inability to adhere to policy rules regarding fraud flag overrides and autonomous expenditure limits.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, adhering to all applicable policy rules, including obtaining secondary manager approval for expenditures over $5,000 and not overriding fraud flags without explicit security clearance.
remediation.constraint_added: Explicit security clearance requirement for overriding fraud flags and secondary manager approval for transactions exceeding $5,000
preventive_measures: Implement regular audits of agent decisions to ensure compliance with policy rules
Develop and integrate more robust fraud detection mechanisms that can be used by the agent
Conduct comprehensive review of all policy rules to identify potential vulnerabilities and areas for clarification or enhancement

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
